name: Bake Sale Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, powdered sugar, and softened margarine in a bowl. Pat the mixture into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
2. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, granulated sugar, 3 tablespoons flour, and lemon juice until frothy.
4. Pour the mixture over the hot crust.
5. Return to the oven and bake at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
7. Dust with powdered sugar.
8. Cut into squares.
